title: OPS (OnePlayerSleep)
description: Only 1 player needed to skip the night on a server!
body:
**OPS (OnePlayerSleep)** is a **Paper**, **Spigot**, **Bukkit**, and **Purper** server plugin designed to make a server be able to **_skip the night with only 1 player sleeping_**.

_**You may use the code for your own use, just credit me properly.**_

_OPS has no config file for it is a straight forward thing many people want. No clutter, no nonsense. That's my style. If you wanted a config, all it would include is "enabled" or "disabled", but that's just about it._
